name: Razor Clam, Tamarind
steps: Place the clams in cold water to clean them.
Once they are clean, remove them from the water.
Categorize them by size and place in vacuum bag, facing the same direction. Vacuum on 90%.
Cook in boiling water for 45 seconds then stop heating.
Once cooked and cooled clean, remove from shell and cut the long mussel part of the razor clam.
Trim and bag and freeze for sauce.
Mix the ingredients for the sauce and bring to the boil. Cook for 1 minute.
Finish with 0.25 g xanthan for every 100 g sauce.
